fields.title: agent: add operation gate (semaphore) to AgentManager
fields.description: Wrap all mutating operations in AgentManager (spawn, shutdown, shutdownAll, list) with a Semaphore(1) to prevent concurrent mutation of the agents HashMap.nnerg-effect reference: AgentManagerLive.ts uses operationGate = Effect.makeSemaphore(1) and wraps spawn/send/wait/close/closeAll/gc with withPermits(1).
fields.design: Add Effect.makeSemaphore(1) in AgentManagerLive Effect.gen. Create withGate = semaphore.withPermits(1). Wrap spawn, shutdown, shutdownAll with withGate. list is read-only but should also go through gate for consistent snapshots.
fields.acceptance_criteria: All mutating manager operations are serialized through the semaphore. Concurrent spawn calls do not produce duplicate entries or corrupt the HashMap.
fields.notes: Implemented semaphore operation gate in extensions/tau/src/agent/manager.ts: added Effect.makeSemaphore(1) + withGate and wrapped spawn/list/shutdown/shutdownAll. get remains ungated. Ran npm run gate in extensions/tau; typecheck/lint/test passed (lint has existing warnings only).
fields.close_reason: Implemented and reviewed. All manager operations gated with Semaphore(1).
